## What does this PR do?

Brief description of the change.

## Type

- [ ] Data addition (new company, relationship, or component)
- [ ] Data correction / update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature / UI improvement
- [ ] Other

## Source (for data PRs)

Link to official announcement or credible source.

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Company IDs use `lowercase_snake_case`
- [ ] Country codes and entity types use valid enum values
- [ ] Relationships reference existing company IDs
- [ ] No unrelated file changes
